LotteryCampaign.title: LotteryCampaign
LotteryCampaign.description: Represents an individual lottery or raffle prize campaign

id.description: The unique ID of the lottery campaign

description.description: Detailed rules and descriptions of the lottery

prizePool.description: Grand prize or monetary prize pool

ticketPrice.description: The cost of a single raffle entry ticket

totalTickets.description: The maximum number of tickets available

soldTickets.description: The total number of tickets currently purchased

status.description: Current state of the lottery draw

winnerEmail.description: Email identifier of the winning buyer

RaffleTicket.title: RaffleTicket
RaffleTicket.description: Represents an individual entry ticket purchased for a lottery campaign

lotteryId.description: Reference ID to the target LotteryCampaign

lotteryTitle.description: Denormalized campaign title for fast lookup UI

ticketNumber.description: Unique assigned index/number for raffle draw

ManagedUser.title: ManagedUser
ManagedUser.description: Represents a system operator or administrator authorized to use the platform

password.description: User verification hash or trace parameter

permission.description: Explicit capabilities or access permissions description string

RolePermissionConfig.title: RolePermissionConfig
RolePermissionConfig.description: Custom visibility and feature access configuration matrix for distinct roles

id.description: Role identifier like user, editor, admin, superadmin

dashboard.description: Grant access to the campaign dashboard

history.description: Grant access to ticket validation ledger history list

users.description: Grant access to manage users database profiles

permissions.description: Grant access to modify role configurations

DashboardPanel.title: DashboardPanel
DashboardPanel.description: Represents a distinct dashboard panel categorization group for separating campaigns and stats

id.description: The unique ID of the panel

name.description: The visible display name of the panel

description.description: A description of the panel focus

lotteries/{lotteryId}.description: Exposes standard and active lottery campaign structures

users/{userId}.description: System user profiles managing lotteries and tickets

role_permissions/{roleId}.description: Visibility constraints and access controls assigned to individual user access levels

panels/{panelId}.description: Collection of available dashboard panels for separate campaign groups
